breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. strikes hit around Iran's Qeshm island, says state media
breaking.summary: Fars news agency reported an "American missile strike in the vicinity of Qeshm", citing local authorities, while Tasnim news agency said one of its correspondents reported locations around Qeshm "were struck by projectiles from the American enemy"

breaking.title: Iran slams 'barbaric' U.S. attack after hospital evacuated due to nearby strike
breaking.summary: At the heart of the fighting is the Strait of Hormuz, a waterway crucial to global oil and gas flows

breaking.title: 1 Dead, 3 Injured As Crane Collapses From 13th Floor Near Mumbai
breaking.summary: The accident occurred in the JP North residential complex in Mira Road.

breaking.title: At least one dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
breaking.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year - causing more than 130 deaths, including those at Camp Mystic - is once again being hit.

breaking.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
breaking.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

breaking.title: Kremlin says there's no immediate prospect of resuming peace talks with Ukraine
breaking.summary: Nearly 4-1/2 years into the war, the front lines remain largely static while ‌Russia and Ukraine strike each other's cities and ​key energy infrastructure and attack vessels at sea

breaking.title: NEET-UG 2026 results: 11.21 lakh candidates qualify in re-test; women outshine men
breaking.summary: Two candidates, Aryan Gupta from Punjab and Panshul Bansal from Haryana, secured the highest score of 715 (out of 720 marks) in the re-examination; 19 candidates crossed the 700-mark threshold; of the top 138 candidates (scores above 690), 93% cracked the exam on their first attempt, with 99% of them aged between 17 and 19 years

breaking.title: Canada wildfires spread smoke across North America, prompting air quality alerts
breaking.summary: Smoke from more than 800 blazes has led to air quality concerns as far as Toronto, New York and large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota.
